summary: Frontend testing of new Apariencia page and Ajustes cleanup. All features verified successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Apariencia page at /apariencia has 9 sections all working. Sidebar order: Dashboard, Reservaciones, Calendario, Socios, Base de Datos, Apariencia, Ajustes (correct). /ajustes is clean with no appearance sections. All 6 new features (glassBlur, layoutDensity, pageTransition, iconSize, sidebarStyle, bgImage) are interactive and working. Note: theme button data-testid (theme-rosa etc) had a timeout with wait-based selector but worked fine with query_selector + force click.
tests_passed: 1. Sidebar: Apariencia appears BEFORE Ajustes (position 5 vs 6) ✅
9. Background image URL input + apply (NUEVO) - works ✅
